ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the file was issued or published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the file */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the author */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, audio, document) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the storage system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_categories" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date the file was issued or published
ID of the author who uploaded the file
Type of file (e.g., image, audio, document)
Size of the file in bytes
Path to the file in the storage system
Role of the user (e.g., admin, author, user)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the file being accessed
ID of the user accessing the file
Date when the file was accessed
